headline: Mbappé chasing the crown as France's captain and the favorites' talisman
summary: Kylian Mbappé arrives at WC 2026 as France's captain and one of the tournament's premier talismans, back to top form at Real Madrid. France are among the clear favorites; Mbappé is a leading Golden Boot contender, and another top-scorer finish would put him in reach of the all-time World Cup goalscoring record. France's depth is stacked — reigning Ballon d'Or winner Ousmane Dembélé is among the supporting cast.
angles: Mbappé won it at 19 in 2018 — can he do it as captain at 27?
Golden Boot race: Mbappé vs Kane vs Haaland vs Yamal — who finishes top?
France are SO deep the Ballon d'Or winner isn't even the star — overrated or unstoppable?
Can Mbappé become the all-time World Cup top scorer this tournament?
